title: Bloods And Barricades
description: Adds 16 different models of decorative Blood and some Barricades
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08749fe05761a22383ef9185aea7da9c8a027e36_0.webp)

Adds 16 different models of decorative Bloods
and some Barricades
- Plans to add more Bloods colors and more Barricades of other woods

Mod in Development


###

Exemple in Vanilla


###

Exemple With Mod



In V1.1 now have new craft system with the BloodTable
and the Brush to change bloods or break
